questions.question: Visual redesign scope?
questions.rationale: Merging bars would be nice but user only asked for technical simplification

assumptions: Header and NavTabs stay visually unchanged — no visual redesign
Simplification is technical only: remove h-screen/overflow-auto from Layout, delete the wheel hook, lock body scroll in drawer
CopyVisualButton screenshot logic is unaffected (already handles overflow-x-auto expansion)

answers.Visual redesign scope?: Technical simplicity only — no visual changes to header or nav

acceptance_criteria: Header and NavTabs are visually sticky at top on scroll

parallel_analysis.note: All 5 tasks edit different files with no shared state or imports between them. Layout.tsx, Header.tsx, NavTabs.tsx, useHorizontalScrollOnWheel.ts, and ModelValueDetailDrawer.tsx are fully disjoint write sets. However, since the total diff is ~30 lines and the whole feature fits in a single CHECKPOINT, parallelizing would add more orchestration overhead than it saves. Running all tasks in a single serial Codex pass.
